'''Tnani Ikon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Tnani Ikon was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. She eventually passed her [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and was elevated to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Studying the ways of the [[Jedi Consular]], Ikon became a [[Lore Keeper]] in the [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Temple Archives]], aiding her fellow Jedi in data searches.<ref name="JASE" />

During the years preceding the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], Ikon assisted Master [[Tahl]] in her duties until her [[Death/Legends|death]], at which point he assumed her duties in full. Continuing his work as a librarian, Ikon's methods noticeably differed from Tahl's, as she had formed lasting working relationships with her peers over her many years of experience, which Ikon had yet to gain.<ref name="JASE" />

==Personality and traits==
An impassive woman, Tnani Ikon was very different from his predecessor Master Tahl, as she had a great deal more experience in working with other Jedi out in the field, a relationship Ikon had yet to establish with Jedi using the Archives.<ref name="JASE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice Special Edition: Deceptions]]'' {{1st}}
